Not contested. Mr. Catalanotti is requesting clarification on the tentative. Court addresses typos. The court rules as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT SOTHEBY'S INTERNATIONAL REALTY, INC., MARY LOU CASTELLANOS DEMURRER to Amended CROSS COMPLAINT

is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend as to the causes of action currently alleged against the moving cross-defendant only. Cross-complainant does not have leave to amend to include any new causes of action or add this defendant to any other causes of action currently asserted in the cross-complaint against other cross-defendants. Cross-Complainant shall have 30 days to (1) allege facts in support of negligence cause of action and recovery for negligent infliction of emotional distress; facts in support of each element of negligence must be alleged as well as factual basis for recovery of emotional distress; (2) if cross-complainant seeks recovery of emotional distress damages under other currently asserted causes of action against the moving cross-defendant, cross-complaint must clearly indicate within such cause of action that emotional distress damages are being sought and allege facts in support of such damages; (3) to allege facts in support of recovery of attorney's fees under the tort of another doctrine; Cross-complainant must be mindful of the authorities cited by the cross-defendant in the moving papers as to the applicability and availability of the tort of another recovery and recovery of fees in joint tortfeasor cases; (4) to allege facts in support of allegations that the moving cross-defendant interfered with an existing contract between the Seller and the Listing Agent; a contractual term must be alleged (cross-complainant may attach the Listing Agreement and identify the specific provisions in the body of the Cross-Complaint)
